# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in timing-utils, please report it by opening a private security advisory rather
than a public issue:

https://github.com/timing-poc-org/timing-utils/security/advisories/new

You can expect an initial response within a few days. Once a fix is available, a new patch release will be published and
the advisory disclosed.

## Supported Versions

Only the latest released version is actively supported with security fixes.
